members.name: Get8
members.summary: Gets a signed byte from the stream.

members.name: Get16
members.summary: Gets a signed 16-bit value from the stream.

members.name: Get32
members.summary: Gets a signed 32-bit value from the stream.

members.name: Get64
members.summary: Gets a signed 64-bit value from the stream.

members.name: GetAvailableBytes
members.summary: Returns the number of bytes this [StreamPeer] has available.

members.name: GetData
members.summary: Returns a chunk data with the received bytes, as an [Array] containing two elements: an [enum Error] constant and a [PackedByteArray]. [param bytes] is the number of bytes to be received. If not enough bytes are available, the function will block until the desired amount is received.

members.name: GetDouble
members.summary: Gets a double-precision float from the stream.

members.name: GetFloat
members.summary: Gets a single-precision float from the stream.

members.name: GetHalf
members.summary: Gets a half-precision float from the stream.

members.name: GetPartialData
members.summary: Returns a chunk data with the received bytes, as an [Array] containing two elements: an [enum Error] constant and a [PackedByteArray]. [param bytes] is the number of bytes to be received. If not enough bytes are available, the function will return how many were actually received.

members.name: GetString
members.summary: Gets an ASCII string with byte-length [param bytes] from the stream. If [param bytes] is negative (default) the length will be read from the stream using the reverse process of [method put_string].

members.name: GetU8
members.summary: Gets an unsigned byte from the stream.

members.name: GetU16
members.summary: Gets an unsigned 16-bit value from the stream.

members.name: GetU32
members.summary: Gets an unsigned 32-bit value from the stream.

members.name: GetU64
members.summary: Gets an unsigned 64-bit value from the stream.

members.name: GetUtf8String
members.summary: Gets a UTF-8 string with byte-length [param bytes] from the stream (this decodes the string sent as UTF-8). If [param bytes] is negative (default) the length will be read from the stream using the reverse process of [method put_utf8_string].

members.name: GetVar
members.summary: Gets a Variant from the stream. If [param allow_objects] is [code]true[/code], decoding objects is allowed. Internally, this uses the same decoding mechanism as the [method @GlobalScope.bytes_to_var] method. [b]Warning:[/b] Deserialized objects can contain code which gets executed. Do not use this option if the serialized object comes from untrusted sources to avoid potential security threats such as remote code execution.

members.name: Put8
members.summary: Puts a signed byte into the stream.

members.name: Put16
members.summary: Puts a signed 16-bit value into the stream.

members.name: Put32
members.summary: Puts a signed 32-bit value into the stream.

members.name: Put64
members.summary: Puts a signed 64-bit value into the stream.

members.name: PutData
members.summary: Sends a chunk of data through the connection, blocking if necessary until the data is done sending. This function returns an [enum Error] code.

members.name: PutDouble
members.summary: Puts a double-precision float into the stream.

members.name: PutFloat
members.summary: Puts a single-precision float into the stream.

members.name: PutHalf
members.summary: Puts a half-precision float into the stream.

members.name: PutPartialData
members.summary: Sends a chunk of data through the connection. If all the data could not be sent at once, only part of it will. This function returns two values, an [enum Error] code and an integer, describing how much data was actually sent.

members.name: PutString
members.summary: Puts a zero-terminated ASCII string into the stream prepended by a 32-bit unsigned integer representing its size. [b]Note:[/b] To put an ASCII string without prepending its size, you can use [method put_data]: [codeblocks] [gdscript] put_data("Hello world".to_ascii_buffer()) [/gdscript] [csharp] PutData("Hello World".ToAsciiBuffer()); [/csharp] [/codeblocks]

members.name: PutU8
members.summary: Puts an unsigned byte into the stream.

members.name: PutU16
members.summary: Puts an unsigned 16-bit value into the stream.

members.name: PutU32
members.summary: Puts an unsigned 32-bit value into the stream.

members.name: PutU64
members.summary: Puts an unsigned 64-bit value into the stream.

members.name: PutUtf8String
members.summary: Puts a zero-terminated UTF-8 string into the stream prepended by a 32 bits unsigned integer representing its size. [b]Note:[/b] To put a UTF-8 string without prepending its size, you can use [method put_data]: [codeblocks] [gdscript] put_data("Hello world".to_utf8_buffer()) [/gdscript] [csharp] PutData("Hello World".ToUtf8Buffer()); [/csharp] [/codeblocks]

members.name: PutVar
members.signature: public void PutVar(Variant value, bool fullObjects)
members.summary: Puts a Variant into the stream. If [param full_objects] is [code]true[/code] encoding objects is allowed (and can potentially include code). Internally, this uses the same encoding mechanism as the [method @GlobalScope.var_to_bytes] method.

members.name: BigEndian
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], this [StreamPeer] will using big-endian format for encoding and decoding.
